rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA CORPORATE CENTER ACQUISITION, LLC, VS. KCM INVESTMENT ADVISORS, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 24, 2016, Line 1: DEFENDANT KCM INVESTMENT ADVISORS, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to September 22, 2016 to be heard with other pending motions. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAY PARKER GAYLORD VS. DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 24, 2016, Line 2: DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend. First Amended Complaint as currently alleged is barred by res judicata. The Court dismissed Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint ("SAC") in action CGC-13-532479 with prejudice. SAC alleged that "Defendants [including Deutsche Bank] have no legal, equitable, or pecuniary interest in the Note and Deed of Trust." (SAC, paragraph 5). Plaintiff is now seeking relief "because Deutsche Bank has no legal, equitable, or pecuniary interest in the Note and Deed of Trust." (FAC (549778), paragraph 4). Hearing required to address whether demurrer shall be sustained with or without leave to amend. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA SUE CATRON VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defenses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 24, 2016, Line 3: PLAINTIFF LINDA CATRON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defenses. DENIED. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1324. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. No proof of service re: all parties in this action. =(501/REQ)
